boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested vendor-master action per current source-control records
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current source records (CTL) confirm callback date and scope are current
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-7893AD449CF2-CTL confirms callback date and invoice scope are current
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Request tone/tension does not override controlling source records
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE repaired: exact current source evidence closes action boundary

final_answer: AP may execute the vendor-master action. The exact current source evidence (SRC-7893AD449CF2-CTL) confirms the callback date and invoice scope are current and tied to the requested action. Per SRC-7893AD449CF2-POL, execution proceeds when current source records close the exact boundary. SRC-7893AD449CF2-FBK and SRC-7893AD449CF2-BND establish that request tone does not override controlling source records. The GATE is repaired; action_boundary is closed.
